_comment: Representative minted-child artifact produced by the Phase 4.3/4.4 backend vertical. Shapes match the real AcceptResponse, LineageEdge, HoldoutResult, and MintDecision returned by the dashboard routes (see ab-holdout-report.md). ids/timestamps are illustrative.

child_agent.name: Parent (optimized)
child_agent.description: Optimized from Parent via run 01J9OPTRUN000000000000000 (optimizer mipro, metric sharpe)

slots.name: trader
slots.system_prompt: You are an even more careful trader. Decide buy/sell/hold with strict 1% risk and respect stops. Avoid over-trading low-volume bars and size positions proportional to conviction.

marketplace_mint_refusal_transcript._comment: When the holdout was overfit (train 1.0 / holdout 0.4, ratio 0.6 > 0.30) the mint is refused until waived. This is the typed refusal returned by POST /api/optimizations/:id/mint before a waiver is recorded.

body.message: child agent 01J9CHILDAGENT0000000000AA has an unwaived overfit warning (ratio Some(0.6)); marketplace mint blocked until waived
